title: stromanthe humilis
intro: Stromanthe humilis, also known as the Thai Alabaster, is a species of flowering plant in the family Marantaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, and improving sleep quality, due to its sedative and calming properties. Traditionally, Stromanthe humilis has been prepared as an herbal tea by steeping the leaves in hot water, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
